name: mimir-workspace
description: Source of truth for work state — tasks, the work hierarchy, and frozen artifacts. Local-first, agent-driven; SQLite is the substrate, markdown a projection.

scripts.test: bun run assets && bun test packages/bin
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run test && bun run test:ui
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run assets && bun build packages/bin/src/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/mimir
